name: Warriors Of Freedom
short_description: Old schooled turn based tactics game. You have an army of warriors and a leader. Pick your leader, gather up your army and fight for your freedom. You have to decide carefully as you have finite amount of everything. Prove your value.
detailed_description:
Wishlist My New Game

In this turn-based strategy game, you assemble a team of characters fighting for freedom, and appoint a leader hero to lead the team. Each hero has their own action points and abilities, all of which can be used by switching between heroes within the same turn, increasing the possibility of creating a deeper strategy. As you progress and complete stages, both heroes and the leader level up. Leveling up heroes improves their abilities, while you get to choose new abilities for the leader. You can also take one action per turn with your leader. Will you be able to achieve freedom?

Lead 3 unique warriors and a hero to win battles. While your warriors fight on the map, your hero supports them with abilities used from off-map. Each time you level up, your hero's mana points increase and at certain levels, selectable abilities become available. As for your warriors, new abilities become usable at specific levels.

There are 5 types of warriors.

-Swordman

-Ranger

-Mage

-Healer

-Berserker

Also there are 3 types of Leaders.

-Fire Based

-Lightning Based

-Various Magic Based

As heroes level up, their action points increase, some skills are unlocked, and already unlocked skills become stronger. Leaders unlock new abilities at specific levels to assist warriors in combat.

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
